flavorPhrases: The root system of a banyan has grown around {container}. It takes some effort to free.
A hollow bamboo stalk, capped and lashed. Whoever made it knew how to keep water out.
Someone wove the entrance shut with green vines. Careful cutting reveals {container} behind them.
Buried at the base of a strangler fig, deep enough to stay cool through the heat.
The canopy drip carved a channel in the stone over the years. Following it leads to a dry pocket.
A flat stone half-sunken into the mud. Beneath it, wrapped in broad leaves, something was set aside.
